en.extract:
The velvet-mantled drongo (Dicrurus modestus) is a species of bird in the family Dicruridae.
It is found throughout the Cameroon line and the African tropical rainforest.


References

Gill, F and D Donsker (Eds). 2012. IOC World Bird Names (v 2.11). Available at http://www.worldbirdnames.org/ [Accessed 2/27/2012].

The '''velvet-mantled drongo''' ('''''Dicrurus modestus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Dicruridae]].
It is found throughout the [[Cameroon line]] and the [[Tropical rainforest|African tropical rainforest]].

==References==
{{reflist}}
*Gill, F and D Donsker (Eds). 2012. IOC World Bird Names (v 2.11). Available at http://www.worldbirdnames.org/ [Accessed 2/27/2012].
